title: Better Night Vision
description: Makes your world bright everywhere, no darkness at all!
body:
# Better Night Vision

Struggling to see clearly in caves oceans or nighttime exploration Better Night Vision is a clean lightweight resource pack built for OptiFine that brightens low light environments using custom lightmaps and shaders. No more torches spam no more fumbling with potions just full visibility wherever you go.
> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) required to work

![Night Time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6fc4583acbf921f383e6bf0f94dada0ddbd82c9.png)


Ideal for survival mining and speedrunning this pack keeps everything bright without blowing out colors so the world still feels natural detailed and immersive.

---

### ✔ Clear visibility in every dark area

Perfect for caves ravines end portals underwater and nighttime adventuring

### ✔ No torches or potions required

Just install and play with full vision anywhere

![Better night vision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b0ad92d13cca86f7d6b9d485c84e713c96a8dc.jpeg)

### ✔ Stays natural and balanced

Brightness improves without washing out colors or detail

### ✔ Works well with most texture packs

Keep your visuals while gaining clarity and exploration freedom

> please support me on paypal
